title: User has_many Posts migration with cascade
prompt: Write a migration creating a `posts` table with title (not null), body (text), and a user_id foreign key that cascades on delete. Include UTC timestamps. Write to priv/repo/migrations/20260411300000_create_posts.exs.
tier_rationale: Canonical create_table with references + on_delete. Easy because the shape is fully templated.
